Starz Team DevelopmentLogin

Swim Team Platform

Starz Team Development

The dedicated platform for private lesson scheduling, coach availability, and team announcements — built to replace spreadsheets with a simple, reliable experience for parents, coaches, and administrators.

Everything your team needs in one place

A focused set of tools designed around how Starz private lessons actually work.

  • Book Private Lessons

    Parents can browse coach availability and reserve private lesson slots for their swimmers during the summer season.

  • Manage Coach Availability

    Coaches set their open time slots so parents always see accurate, up-to-date scheduling without back-and-forth messages.

  • Team Announcements

    Administrators publish announcements that reach the entire team, keeping everyone informed about schedule changes and updates.

Sign in to your account

Select your role to access the platform. Authentication will be available in a future release.

Book lessons and view your swimmer's schedule.

Manage availability and view upcoming lessons.

Manage users, bookings, and team settings.
